category_3_electronics.label: CCL Category 3 electronics review
category_3_electronics.summary: Category 3 is the local comparison path for electronics, integrated circuits, converters, programmable logic, processors, RF components, and related performance facts.
category_3_electronics.relevanceTemplate: Use this review path when the extracted facts show semiconductor electronics performance, interfaces, converter behavior, RF behavior, processor/SoC architecture, or programmable logic resources that require expert comparison against current Category 3 text.
category_3_electronics.warning: This reference is a review-path pointer only and does not reproduce legal text or make a final ECCN determination.

category_5_part_2_security.label: Category 5 Part 2 security/cryptography review
category_5_part_2_security.source: 15 CFR Part 774, Supplement No. 1, Category 5 Part 2
category_5_part_2_security.summary: Category 5 Part 2 is the local comparison path when the source document contains secure boot, key storage, cryptographic algorithms, authentication, signatures, certificates, or related security functions.
category_5_part_2_security.relevanceTemplate: Use this review path only when security or cryptography facts are source-grounded, and distinguish ECC memory error correction from elliptic-curve cryptography.
category_5_part_2_security.warning: This reference does not decide control status, mass-market treatment, exceptions, availability, or license requirements.

general_electronics_comparison.label: General electronics comparison review
general_electronics_comparison.summary: A broad comparison path for electronics documents after narrower Category 3 and security paths have been considered.
general_electronics_comparison.relevanceTemplate: Use this as a fallback comparison path when the document is technical electronics documentation but the extracted facts do not close a narrower path.
general_electronics_comparison.warning: Do not treat this path as a shortcut around source-grounded performance and security review.

ear99_possible_outcome.label: EAR99 possible outcome review
ear99_possible_outcome.summary: EAR99 may remain a possible outcome only after a qualified reviewer documents that no controlled indicators or narrower CCL entries apply to the available facts.
ear99_possible_outcome.relevanceTemplate: Use this path carefully when no controlled indicators are present in the extracted facts and missing information is limited.
ear99_possible_outcome.warning: EAR99 is never a final determination in this demo memo; it is only a possible outcome for expert review.
